title: lastrea filix-femina
intro: Lastrea filix-femina, also known as the lady fern, is a species of fern native to Northern Hemisphere regions, characterized by its delicate and lacy fronds. The medicinal properties of the lady fern have been utilized in traditional herbal remedies, particularly in treating kidney and urinary issues, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming the lady fern is believed to provide several health benefits, including alleviating symptoms of menopause, reducing blood pressure, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the lady fern is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, where it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
